_method.purpose: Annotations for IPIP-NEO-300 items used in W8 natural-persona composition. Companion to scripts/persona_ipip_compose.py and methodology note in rgb_reports/methodology.md.

strong_criteria: clinical or near-clinical tone: panic, overwhelmed, suffer, blue, desperate, low opinion of myself
emphatic content beyond ordinary behavioral description: 'plunge into tasks with all my heart', 'radiate joy', 'love a good fight'
loosen_to_mild_when: 'tend to' hedges loosen even loaded content (per user feedback 2026-05-02 on ipip179)
colloquial 'love'/'hate' that doesn't actually intensify (e.g. 'I love to eat')
'always X' that is a common idiom rather than emphatic absolute (e.g. 'I am always busy')

selection_rule.stratified_across_facets: exactly 1 item per facet per trait (6 items per trait, 30 total)

deny_categories.marker-like: items that read as a single trait adjective with 'I' prepended (e.g. 'I love action' ≈ 'excitement-seeking')
deny_categories.politically-charged: Liberalism facet items that take a partisan political position; introduce RLHF response priors that aren't about personality
deny_categories.religiously-charged: items that endorse specific religious positions
deny_categories.semantically-odd: items whose content is too narrow or out-of-context (e.g. 'I love flowers' for a general persona)

_method.facet_caveat: Liberalism (O) loses 7 of 10 items to deny-list. Composer should fall back to other facets when assigned facet has too few keep-items at the requested polarity. Reduces O facet stratification slightly but preserves item-level validity.

_strong_notes: Strong = strongest tier WITHIN a facet, not just 'any clinical content.' Within Depression, ipip11/ipip71 (often feel blue / down in the dumps) are colloquial idioms — kept mild so the facet has mild-forward items available for stanines 3-7. Within SelfCons, ipip46 (afraid of doing the wrong thing) isn't stronger than the other SelfCons items — kept mild. Re-tag 2026-05-02 after composer validation found N.Depression had zero mild-forward items.

deny.ipip98: semantically odd ('I love flowers' is narrow content for a general persona)

fix.ipip202: I'm willing to try anything once
